rulings.Case Title: SHARON JENNINGS ET AL VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2017, Wednesday, in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion for order granting leave to file first amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to January 19, 2017. = (503/GLW)
